case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. ANDREW PHILLIP ZIEGLER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $90.55) SERVED NOV-26-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZIEGLER, ANDREW PHILLIP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-31-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY IS PRESENT JOSEPH QUARTELL COLLECTION MANAGER. DEFENDANT ANDREW PHILLIP ZIEGLER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZIEGLER, ANDREW PHILLIP $1,371.70 PRINCIPAL, $90.55 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,462.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,371.70 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ZIEGLER, ANDREW PHILLIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
